title: Vacancy for Teacher at Udemy India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Udemy India
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
